hint_dist_user.name: blitz
hint_dist_user.description: Draft hint distribution for variable win conditions.

Colossus (Spirit Temple).text: They say that slaying #50 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #a Red Rupee#.

DMC (Bombable Wall).text: They say that the final reward from the #Frogs of Zora's River# is #a Recovery Heart#.

DMT (Biggoron).text: They say that plundering #Kokiri Forest# is a foolish choice.

DMT (Storms Grotto).text: They say that arbitrary code execution leads to the credits sequence.

Dodongos Cavern (Bombable Wall).text: They say that slaying #40 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Deku Nuts (10 pieces)#.

GC (Maze).text: They say that plundering #Kokiri Forest# is a foolish choice.

GC (Medigoron).text: They say that plundering #Ganon's Castle# is a foolish choice.

GV (Waterfall).text: They say that plundering #Zora's Domain# is a foolish choice.

Graveyard (Shadow Temple).text: They say that the #Ocarina of Time# teaches #the Nocturne of Shadow#.

HC (Malon).text: They say that plundering #Ganon's Castle# is a foolish choice.

HC (Rock Wall).text: They say that slaying #30 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #a Piece of Heart#.

HC (Storms Grotto).text: They say that the final item you're looking for can be found somewhere in Hyrule.

HF (Open Grotto).text: I've heard Sploosh Kaboom is a tricky game.

HF (Southeast Grotto).text: When all else fails, use Fire.

KF (Deku Tree Left).text: They say that #Kakariko Village# is on the path of #Spirit#.

KF (Deku Tree Right).text: They say that #Kakariko Village# is on the path of #Spirit#.

KF (Outside Storms).text: They say that the final reward from the #Frogs of Zora's River# is #a Recovery Heart#.

KF (Storms Grotto).text: You found a spiritual Stone! By which I mean, I worship Nayru.

Kak (Open Grotto).text: May the way of the Hero lead to the Triforce.

LH (Lab).text: They say that slaying #30 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #a Piece of Heart#.

LH (Southeast Corner).text: They say that #Lake Hylia# is on the path of #Water#.

LH (Southwest Corner).text: They say that in #Gerudo Valley# the hammer unlocks #a Strength Upgrade#.

LW (Bridge).text: They say that the #Skull Mask# yields #a Red Rupee#.

LW (Near Shortcuts Grotto).text: They say that crouch stabs mimic the effects of your last attack.

SFM (Maze Lower).text: They say that upon the #Colossus's left hand# is #a Red Rupee#.

SFM (Maze Upper).text: They say that the #Skull Mask# yields #a Red Rupee#.

SFM (Saria).text: They say that slaying #40 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Deku Nuts (10 pieces)#.

ToT (Left).text: They say that a #ravaged village# mourns with #Saria's Song#.

ToT (Left-Center).text: They say that #Lake Hylia# is on the path of #Water#.

ToT (Right).text: They say that #Death Mountain Trail# is on the path of #Shadow#.

ToT (Right-Center).text: They say that a #ravaged village# mourns with #Saria's Song#.

ZD (Mweep).text: They say that slaying #50 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #a Red Rupee#.

ZF (Fairy).text: They say that the #Ocarina of Time# teaches #the Nocturne of Shadow#.

ZF (Jabu).text: They say that plundering #Zora's Domain# is a foolish choice.

ZR (Near Domain).text: They say that #Death Mountain Trail# is on the path of #Shadow#.

ZR (Near Grottos).text: They say that Sheik waits at a #monument to time# to teach #the Bolero of Fire#.

ZR (Open Grotto).text: They say that you're wasting time reading this hint, but I disagree. Talk to me again!
